name: LAKELAND INDUSTRIES INC
summary: Lakeland Industries, Inc. (doing business as Lakeland Fire + Safety) is a global provider of safety products protecting workers, first responders, and communities. Products include firefighter protective apparel and accessories, high-end chemical protective suits, limited use/disposable protective clothing, durable woven garments, high performance FR/AR apparel, and high visibility clothing. The company operates ten manufacturing facilities in eight countries across five continents, serving chemical, clean room, energy, fire service, manufacturing, and utility markets worldwide.

products.name: Firefighter Protective Apparel and Accessories
products.description: NFPA and CE compliant structural and wildland firefighter turnout gear, helmets, hoods, and gloves.

products.name: High-End Chemical Protective Suits
products.description: Heavy-duty chemical protective suits made from proprietary CRFR, ChemMax 3, 4, Interceptor and other fabrics.

products.name: Limited Use/Disposable Protective Clothing
products.description: Disposable coveralls, lab coats, hoods, aprons, and related garments for industrial and medical applications.

products.name: Durable Woven Garments
products.description: Launderable woven garments for industrial and healthcare markets, complementing disposable and firefighting lines.

products.name: High Performance FR/AR Apparel
products.description: Dual-certified flame-resistant apparel with moisture-wicking technology and lightweight design.

products.name: High Visibility Clothing
products.description: High visibility protective clothing for worker safety applications.

products.name: Firefighting and Safety Boots
products.description: Professional footwear for firefighting, military, police, and rescue markets, manufactured by Jolly Scarpe.

products.name: CleanMax
products.description: Clean manufactured and sterilized version of MicroMAX NS product for aseptic laboratory environments.
